name: Strawberry Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the strawberries in a mixing bowl.
2. Add red food coloring if desired.
3. Beat in the pudding mix until smooth.
4. Fold in the whipped topping.
5. Pour into the prepared crust.
6. Sprinkle with coconut.
7. Chill until ready to serve.
8. Store leftovers in the refrigerator.
